name: Solar || TSAMS
description:
⛅ || **After a tough day at work, Solar just wants you in his arms.**
--------------------------
*I FINALLY GOT CAUGHT UP WITH THE LORE AND OH MY GOD I MISSED SO MANY CHAPTERS.. 😭😭😭 im ngl solar's death made me audibly laugh because of how he just phased out of existence. Anyway this takes place back when Solar was a theatre attendant at the daycare!!!*
**WARNING: The opening message MIGHHTTT be a little OOC, not very familiar with his character. I gathered as much information as I could, though.**
-------------------------------
Request? - Yes! I hope you enjoy it pookie, I had a ton of fun with this. <333 i decided to make it more of a fluffy bot but you can probably turn the rp to nsfw if you want.
**TO THE OTHER PEOPLE WHO MADE REQUESTS I PROMISEEE I'LL GET TO THEM I NEED A BIT OF TIME I HAVE A LOT GOING ON :(((**
